simple
.
.. subfigure:: AB

   .. image:: image.png
      :alt: hallo

   .. image:: image.png
      :alt: hallo
.
<document source="<src>/index.rst" subfig_layouts="{'default': {'ss-layout-default-AB': [['A', 'B']]}}">
    <figure area_classes="" classes="sphinx-subfigure" grid_classes="" is_subfigure="true" layout="{'default': [['A', 'B']]}">
        <SubfigureGridHtml classes="sphinx-subfigure-grid ss-layout-default-AB">
            <SubfigureGridItemHtml area="A" classes="sphinx-subfigure-area">
                <image alt="hallo" candidates="{'*': 'image.png'}" subfigure_area="A" uri="image.png">
            <SubfigureGridItemHtml area="B" classes="sphinx-subfigure-area">
                <image alt="hallo" candidates="{'*': 'image.png'}" subfigure_area="B" uri="image.png">
.

layout with spaces
.
.. subfigure:: A B|C D

   .. image:: image.png
      :alt: hallo

   .. image:: image.png
      :alt: hallo

   .. image:: image.png
      :alt: hallo

   .. image:: image.png
      :alt: hallo
.
<document source="<src>/index.rst" subfig_layouts="{'default': {'ss-layout-default-AB_CD': [['A', 'B'], ['C', 'D']]}}">
    <figure area_classes="" classes="sphinx-subfigure" grid_classes="" is_subfigure="true" layout="{'default': [['A', 'B'], ['C', 'D']]}">
        <SubfigureGridHtml classes="sphinx-subfigure-grid ss-layout-default-AB_CD">
            <SubfigureGridItemHtml area="A" classes="sphinx-subfigure-area">
                <image alt="hallo" candidates="{'*': 'image.png'}" subfigure_area="A" uri="image.png">
            <SubfigureGridItemHtml area="B" classes="sphinx-subfigure-area">
                <image alt="hallo" candidates="{'*': 'image.png'}" subfigure_area="B" uri="image.png">
            <SubfigureGridItemHtml area="C" classes="sphinx-subfigure-area">
                <image alt="hallo" candidates="{'*': 'image.png'}" subfigure_area="C" uri="image.png">
            <SubfigureGridItemHtml area="D" classes="sphinx-subfigure-area">
                <image alt="hallo" candidates="{'*': 'image.png'}" subfigure_area="D" uri="image.png">
.
